name: RapiDoc Events
description: JavaScript events emitted by the <rapi-doc> web component.

fields.name: spec-loaded
fields.description: Fired after the OpenAPI specification has been loaded and parsed.

fields.name: before-try
fields.description: Fired before the Try It request is sent. Allows modifying the request (e.g., injecting auth headers).

detail.request: Fetch Request object that can be modified

fields.name: after-try
fields.description: Fired after the Try It request completes with the response.

fields.name: api-server-change
fields.description: Fired when the user selects a different server from the server dropdown.

detail.selectedServer: URL of the newly selected server

fields.name: before-render
fields.description: Fired before the component renders, useful for custom initialization logic.
